reason: The missing parent "URIの指定方法" section contains two pieces of content: (1) an introductory sentence listing the two URI types, and (2) a folder structure diagram. The introductory sentence is functionally redundant — the two URI types are already named in the titles of s2 and s3, and both sections contain "URIの指定方法" as a hint for retrieval. The folder structure (web/img/header_bar.jpg, etc.) is illustrative scaffolding for the specific code samples; the actual implementation patterns in s2–s4 are self-contained and remain fully correct without it. An AI agent answering questions about Nablarch custom tag URI specification would correctly explain both absolute URLs and context-root-relative paths using the existing sections. No actionable knowledge is lost.

findings_assessment.location: index / sections (missing: URIの指定方法 parent section)
findings_assessment.justification: The missing content is (a) an intro sentence listing the two URI types — already conveyed by s2/s3 titles and their 'URIの指定方法' hints — and (b) a folder structure diagram that contextualizes the code samples but is not required to understand or apply the implementation patterns. s2–s4 each stand alone as complete, correct implementation guidance. The Phase E fix agent produced output identical to the pre-fix state, indicating it evaluated the sub-sections as sufficient coverage and left the structure unchanged rather than injecting a thin parent section that would add no retrieval value.
